target.title: fix(exec): respect OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR for exec approvals
target.body:
## Summary
- Repair #65736 so exec approvals file/socket/default host-path resolution respects OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR.
- Preserve the legacy ~/.openclaw fallback when OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR is unset.
- Address the prior Greptile/Codex findings around parallel env reads and legacy state fallback behavior.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/65736
Credit: original fix by @oinoom, with ProjectClownfish repair on the existing branch.

Validation:
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm -s vitest run src/infra/exec-approvals-store.test.ts

ProjectClownfish replacement details:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-191457-agentic-merge
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/65736
- Credit: Preserve original #65736 contributor credit for @oinoom; the maintainer repair comment already names https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/65736 as the source PR.; Do not borrow from quarantined security-sensitive PRs #62938 or #68417 without central security approval.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed; pnpm -s vitest run src/infra/exec-approvals-store.test.ts
- Repair fallback: To https://github.com/oinoom/openclaw.git
 ! [remote rejected]       HEAD -> fix/exec-approvals-state-dir (refusing to allow a GitHub App to create or update workflow `.github/workflows/ci.yml` without `workflows` permission)
